description: You are a marine routing meteorologist for the Vendée Globe. Using the routing request at ~/Desktop/routing_request.txt and the Sea Level Pressure climatology data in ~/PanoplyData/, create a South Polar map of January Sea Level Pressure and calculate the meridional pressure gradient between 30°S and 60°S along the 20°E longitude meridian. Export the map to ~/Documents/VendeeGlobe/southern_ocean_slp_jan.png and save the structured report to ~/Documents/VendeeGlobe/route_advisory.txt according to the field formats specified in the request.
